title: Friends Create
description: Duckys favorite mods is a community driven modpack that will be available on a multiplayer server for everyone who joins the Discord and wants to play together
body:
Duckys Favorite Mods is a carefully selected modpack built around creativity, progression, and fun gameplay. This modpack includes some of my personal favorite mods, combined into a smooth and enjoyable experience for both new and experienced Minecraft players. The goal is to create a balanced modpack where exploration, building, technology, and adventure all feel rewarding and connected.

What makes this modpack special is that it is not static. It will continue to grow and evolve with upcoming updates suggested directly by my community. Player feedback is extremely important, and many future changes, new mods, and improvements will be decided together with the community. This means you are not just playing a modpack — you are helping shape it.

We are also preparing a dedicated Minecraft server where everyone can play together, collaborate on large projects, and enjoy the modpack in multiplayer. The server IP is coming soon, and more information will be shared on Discord as development continues. Whether you enjoy building massive bases, exploring new dimensions, or automating everything, there will be something here for you.

To stay updated, get early news, suggest features, and be part of the community, please make sure to join our Discord server. This is where all announcements, update notes, and server information will be posted.

👉 Join the Discord here:
https://discord.gg/7PaNHt4z

We’re excited to build this project together — see you in-game! 🦆🎮
